heading: Returns relating to certain railroad retirement benefits
label: 6050G Returns relating to certain railroad retirement benefits
notes: References in TextThe Railroad Retirement Act of 1974, referred to in subsec. (a)(1), is , as amended generally by , , , which is classified generally to subchapter IV (§ 231 et seq.) of chapter 9 of Title 45, Railroads. children.text: the aggregate amount of benefits paid under the Railroad Retirement Act of 1974 (other than tier 1 railroad retirement benefits, as defined in section 86(d)(4)) to any individual during any calendar year,
the employee contributions which are treated as having been paid for purposes of section 72(r),
the name and address of such individual, and
such other information as the Secretary may require.

children.heading: Statements to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required
children.label: b Statements to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required

children.text: the aggregate amount of payments to such individual, and of employee contributions with respect thereto, required to be shown on the return, and
such other information as the Secretary may require.
